mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notice (title, content, status, publish_time, is_deleted, create_by, update_by, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{status}, #{publishTime}, 0, #{createBy}, #{updateBy}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT id, title, content, status, publish_time, is_deleted, create_by, update_by, create_time, update_time FROM notice WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE notice SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, status = #{status}, publish_time = #{publishTime}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE notice SET is_deleted = 1, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE notice SET status = #{status}, publish_time = #{publishTime}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM notice
is_deleted = 0
AND title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND status = #{status}

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM notice
is_deleted = 0 AND status = 'PUBLISHED'
AND title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')

SELECT id, title, content, status, publish_time, is_deleted, create_by, update_by, create_time, update_time FROM notice
is_deleted = 0 AND status = 'PUBLISHED'
AND title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY publish_time DESC, create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}
SELECT id, title, content, status, publish_time, is_deleted, create_by, update_by, create_time, update_time FROM notice WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0 AND status = 'PUBLISHED' LIMIT 1
